nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: Nature forest, night, in middle table with 90s computer on it, in computer's monitor text blue pixeled: "ComfyUI"

Search in "templates" for models.
You can add only from image tab and only T2I (Text to image).
If i was you i would add: Flux.2 klein 4b, Qwen image 2512, Flux.2 [DEV], Ernie image turbo, longcat image, ovis image, Flux.1 Schnell Full or just some api image generators.
After that connect your 4 image generation models to next step↓

Conect output of each image generation node to "Draw Text" node 
Also unbypass all of them

If you still don't know which model is better visit this leaderboard
https://huggingface.co/spaces/CrazyDashTool/OSL-Leaderboard
Here you go, everything is done, press run and you done

groups.title: Enable to turn on names in photos (CTRL + B)
Your models like Qwen image 2512 or Flux.2 [DEV]

widgets_values: Latina female with thick wavy hair, harbor boats and pastel houses behind. Breezy seaside light, warm tones, cinematic close-up.

nodes.title: Optional Flow Shift
widgets_values: Flow Shift node set to 1.0 represents intended shift by the creator of the Chroma model and will produce greater detail.

Chroma final model has been released and is hosted [here](https://huggingface.co/lodestones/Chroma1-HD). You can visit [here](https://huggingface.co/lodestones/Chroma) to get previous versions for download. For other models, if you have used models related to Flux, then you probably don't need to download them again.

## diffusion_models

[Chroma1-HD.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lodestones/Chroma1-HD/resolve/main/Chroma1-HD.safetensors)

or fp8_scaled version for lower VRAM GPU

[Chroma1-HD-fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Chroma1-HD_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/Chroma1-HD-fp8mixed.safetensors)


## text_encoders

[t5xxl_fp16](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/resolve/main/t5xxl_fp16.safetensors)

or

[t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/resolve/main/t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)

## vae

[ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Lumina_Image_2.0_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)


```
📂 ComfyUI/
├─ 📂 models/
│   ├─ 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │     ├── Chroma1-HD-fp8_scaled_rev2_learned_topp0.25_k16-2688_svd.safetensors
│   │     └── Chroma1-HD.safetensors
│   ├─ 📂 text_encoders/
│   │     ├── t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors
│   │     └── t5xxl_fp16.safetensors 
│   └─ 📂 vae/
│            └──  ae.safetensors
```

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: This is a nature documentary close-up photograph of the right side of the face of a tiger. The photograph is centered on it's highly detailed and speckled eye surrounded by intricately detailed fur. Overlaid at the center of the image is a title text that says "CHROMA1-HD" in a large white 3D letters. Amateur photography. Unfiltered. Real life. Natural light. Subtle shadows.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: This low quality greyscale unfinished sketch is inaccurate and flawed. The image is very blurred and lacks detail with excessive chromatic aberrations and artifacts. The image is overly saturated with excessive bloom. It has a toony aesthetic with bold outlines and flat colors.

Beautiful photography of a gorgeous-haired female artist, natural and authentic, her hair styled in a messy casual bun, smiling joyfully and looking directly at the camera, cinematic lighting, soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field, warm gentle tones, film grain, high detail, 8K, realistic portrait
